history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

An anime-style portrait of a young woman with short, dark, messy hair styled into a bun, sharp green eyes, and pale skin. She is wearing a delicate white lace camisole and a black choker necklace. Her head is turned slightly to the side, looking towards the viewer with a soft, knowing smile. Her left arm is bent, and her hand is resting on her chest. The background is a vast field of small, white flowers, blurred and out of focus, creating a dreamy, ethereal atmosphere. White petals are gently falling around her, adding to the whimsical feel. The lighting is soft and diffused, with a gentle sunbeam catching the right side of her face and hair, creating a subtle glow. The color palette is dominated by soft whites, pale blues, and muted greens, with the dark hair and choker providing a slight contrast. The overall mood is serene, delicate, and slightly melancholic, evoking a sense of gentle beauty and fleeting moments. The art style is reminiscent of modern anime with clean lines and soft shading.
